name: CANOPY BY HILTON SIOUX FALLS DOWNTOWN

violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. The banquet kitchen dish machine is not achieving proper sanitizing temperatures. When tested observed the highest temperature to reach 146.4?F.
POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of cut vegetable sauces and ingredients was noted not being properly dated for disposition.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. The banquet kitchen dish machine is not achieving proper sanitizing temperatures.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Clean utensils noted stored in an unprotected location. Observed bins storing clean utensils in the Cascata kitchen has debris build up. Clean coffee pot and cream pitchers noted not being stored in a self draining position to allow for air drying. Observed residual water remaining in vessel after being washed.
